practices.name: Moriarity Agency

evidence.label: No HTTPS / insecure
evidence.evidence_str: The site does not load over a valid HTTPS connection, so browsers flag it as “Not secure” in the address bar.

evidence.label: No mobile viewport tag
evidence.evidence_str: The homepage has no mobile viewport tag, so it isn’t built to adapt to phone screens — mobile visitors get a zoomed-out desktop layout.

evidence.label: Stale copyright year
evidence.evidence_str: The footer still reads “© 2019 Moriarity Agency” — 7 years out of date, a sign the site hasn’t been touched since then.

evidence.label: Built on GoDaddy Website Builder
evidence.evidence_str: The site is built on GoDaddy Website Builder.

evidence.label: No clear call-to-action
evidence.evidence_str: The homepage has no clickable phone number, booking link, contact form, or email visible in the page source.

practices.draft_observation: Moriarity Agency's site doesn’t load over a secure https connection, so browsers show visitors a “Not secure” warning.
